objective: Align CI, release workflow, and the version-bump script with the new core/+cli/ Cargo workspace while keeping the published `grove` binary's asset names and paths unchanged.
key_changes: release.yml: build step → `cargo build --release --locked -p grove --target <t>` so the asset stays pinned to the grove package; tar/7z packaging paths unchanged.
ci.yml: build and test broadened to `--workspace` so grove-core is built and tested too.
bump-version.sh: also bump core/Cargo.toml (already does cli/), update both lock entries via `cargo update -p grove -p grove-core`, and assert both grove + grove-core lock versions.
Verify-only (no edits expected): setup-local-test.sh still yields target/release/grove; npm install.js + package.json and homebrew update-formula.sh resolve `grove` assets by unchanged names.
Material change (CI/release tooling) but no release cut here; no schema/data-model change.
Dry validation: `cargo build --release --locked -p grove` + `cargo test --release --locked --workspace` + clippy, plus an idempotent bump-version.sh run and a release.yml asset-name review.
